feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1838 201 1637 80
PT 1558 144 1414 8

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: RestTap
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

RestTap is a simple fitness and habit tracking app designed to help you stay consistent. With RestTap you can: • Track your workouts and routines • Build healthy habits • Monitor your daily progress • Stay motivated with a clean and minimal design RestTap focuses on simplicity and ease of use so you can concentrate on what really matters: your health and consistency.

entry.title: Roman: budget weight loss
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → 0,29 € [0,29 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,29 €

Application Description

Ready to kickstart your journey to a healthier you on a budget? Look no further than the Roman app – your ultimate companion for achieving effective weight loss, shedding those extra pounds, and transforming your health without breaking the bank on expensive foods. Key Features: • Personalized Meal Plans: Access a diet calculator designed to meet your specific calorie and meal needs while keeping your budget in check. Input your current weight, and you'll receive a detailed meal plan tailored to your budget-friendly weight loss, calorie goals, and fat burning objectives. • Budget-Savvy Healthy Living: Embrace a healthier lifestyle with tips on nutrition, meal prep, and calorie-conscious choices that won't strain your wallet. Learn how to make every calorie count toward your health, budget weight loss goals, and fat burning efforts, all while enjoying affordable and nutritious food options. • Progress Tracking: Monitor your budget weight loss journey with built-in tracking features. Keep an eye on your calorie-conscious meal plans, nutrition intake, and your progress towards achieving your ideal weight, all while maximizing fat burning, on a budget. • Setting and Achieving Goals: Set realistic health and budget-friendly weight loss goals and use the app to track your progress. Stay motivated and accountable on your transformation journey, guided by expert nutritional advice and personalized tips for effective fat burning. • Budget-Friendly Meal Plans: Optimize your meal plans for cost-effective weight loss, ensuring you're on the right path to achieving your goals without overspending on food. Receive nutritional guidance that makes it easier to maintain a balanced diet while staying within your budget and supporting fat burning. • Calorie Tracking on a Budget: Keep a close eye on your daily calorie intake and expenditure while staying within your budgetary constraints. Achieve your weight loss and budget health goals without breaking the bank, thanks to our expert nutritional advice, progress monitoring tools, and fat burning insights. • Wellness and Transformation: Prioritize your wellness journey with our affordable and personalized approach to nutrition and health. Experience a transformation in your overall well-being while staying on budget, supported by effective fat burning strategies. The Roman app is your go-to solution for achieving a healthier, budget-conscious lifestyle. Say goodbye to costly diets and embrace a budget-friendly approach to weight loss, nutritional wellness, and fat burning. Whether your goal is to lose weight, improve your health, or simply live more frugally while prioritizing your well-being, this app equips you with the tools, personalized guidance, and progress monitoring you need. Start your budget weight loss, nutritional wellness, and fat burning transformation today with the Roman app!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

Application Description

Ready to kickstart your journey to a healthier you on a budget? Look no further than the Roman app – your ultimate companion for achieving effective weight loss, shedding those extra pounds, and transforming your health without breaking the bank on expensive foods. Key Features: • Personalized Meal Plans: Access a diet calculator designed to meet your specific calorie and meal needs while keeping your budget in check. Input your current weight, and you'll receive a detailed meal plan tailored to your budget-friendly weight loss, calorie goals, and fat burning objectives. • Budget-Savvy Healthy Living: Embrace a healthier lifestyle with tips on nutrition, meal prep, and calorie-conscious choices that won't strain your wallet. Learn how to make every calorie count toward your health, budget weight loss goals, and fat burning efforts, all while enjoying affordable and nutritious food options. • Progress Tracking: Monitor your budget weight loss journey with built-in tracking features. Keep an eye on your calorie-conscious meal plans, nutrition intake, and your progress towards achieving your ideal weight, all while maximizing fat burning, on a budget. • Setting and Achieving Goals: Set realistic health and budget-friendly weight loss goals and use the app to track your progress. Stay motivated and accountable on your transformation journey, guided by expert nutritional advice and personalized tips for effective fat burning. • Budget-Friendly Meal Plans: Optimize your meal plans for cost-effective weight loss, ensuring you're on the right path to achieving your goals without overspending on food. Receive nutritional guidance that makes it easier to maintain a balanced diet while staying within your budget and supporting fat burning. • Calorie Tracking on a Budget: Keep a close eye on your daily calorie intake and expenditure while staying within your budgetary constraints. Achieve your weight loss and budget health goals without breaking the bank, thanks to our expert nutritional advice, progress monitoring tools, and fat burning insights. • Wellness and Transformation: Prioritize your wellness journey with our affordable and personalized approach to nutrition and health. Experience a transformation in your overall well-being while staying on budget, supported by effective fat burning strategies. The Roman app is your go-to solution for achieving a healthier, budget-conscious lifestyle. Say goodbye to costly diets and embrace a budget-friendly approach to weight loss, nutritional wellness, and fat burning. Whether your goal is to lose weight, improve your health, or simply live more frugally while prioritizing your well-being, this app equips you with the tools, personalized guidance, and progress monitoring you need. Start your budget weight loss, nutritional wellness, and fat burning transformation today with the Roman app!

entry.title: Tap Roulette - Random Picker
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,49 € → 0,29 € [0,29 € ~ 0,49 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,29 €

Application Description

Tap Roulette is the perfect party game for making decisions with friends. The gameplay is very simple. Each player places their finger on the screen. After tapping "Start," one person will be selected, and the chosen player will face a punishment. Features: - Unlimited number of players - Beautiful piano sound effects - Elegant, simple, and easy to play - Thrilling and exciting game of luck - The ultimate decision-making tool, perfect for parties Note: iPhone can support up to 5 fingers at the same time. iPad can support up to 11 fingers at the same time.

entry.title: Speech to Text : Voice to Text
entry.id: Speech to Text : Voice to Text-pt-1773441307359
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Year：12,99 €
  • 6 Months：5,99 €
  • Month：1,99 €

Application Description

Speech to text : Voice to text is the powerful, real-time dictation solution. Based on the latest artificial intelligence and using a powerful speech recognition engine, This Dictation app accurately transcribes your speech to text in real time. The clean elegant design, along with the non-stop voice recognition and other features means you can relax and focus on your thoughts and content. Using our app , your words will be magically transcribed into text without your ever needing to touch a keyboard. Now you can use the power of your voice to create your words! Easily share your text and files later! (Works with Evernote, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, Facebook, Twitter, Snapchat, WhatsApp and other iOS supported sharing apps.) Whether you’re a professional writer, doctor, lawyer, disabled or somehow prevented from traditional typing, Speech to text : Voice to text app will swiftly solve your transcription problems and help you achieve your writing goals today! This fantastic speech-to-text app will allow you to do more with your iPhone/ iPad : ・Longer Record time: -DICTATE CONTINUOUSLY up-to 1 HOUR. ・Unlimited save & edits ・Transcribed text can be edited directly. ・Ideal for both individual and group transcription ・Background support for voice recognition. ・On-device Speech Recognition. • Voice recognition support for 59 languages and accents. • Share your text on social networks. • Copy your text to other apps. • Send your text as an email or text message. • Create PDF instantly with single click. • Convert text your notes, reports, letters into PDF instantly • Text Analysis using AI. ► Currently Supported Speech Recognition Languages: Arabic, Cantonese, Catalan, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Malay, Norwegian, Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Shanghainese, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese. Technology: New iOS 14 Speech framework having state of the art accuracy, Faster ,Automatically adapts to the user Super easy: Simply click the microphone and start dictating. No need to login or register You can add new paragraphs, punctuation marks, smileys and other special characters using simple voice commands. Who Should Use Speech to Text : Voice to Text ? 1. Reporters: Interviews, conversations and more are easily recorded and transcribed, preserving the original audio. 2. Writers: Novelists, Authors, can all write in their true voice, capturing their moments of inspiration anytime, anywhere. 3. Professionals: Doctors, lawyers, managers, etc. Easily transcribe your daily tasks, notes, conference calls, letters and more! Your voice makes it happen! 4. Elderly or Disabled: Eliminates slow typing, commonly misspelled words or embarrassing composition mistakes. This app makes it convenient and easy to send and share your words with those you love. 5. Language Students: Text analysis using AI , Easily learn and master new words and languages by practicing dictation with speech to text app ! SUBSCRIPTION PRICING & TERMS We offer three auto-renewing subscription options: $1.99 / month $9.49 / 6 months - Save 20% $14.49 / 1 year - Save 40% The price corresponds to the same price segment , which are set in the “Apple App Store Matrix” for other currencies You can cancel a subscription anytime by turning off auto renewal though your iTunes account settings.This must be done 24 hours before the end of subscription period to avoid being charged. The cancellation will take effect the day after the last day of the current subscription. Terms of Service : https://voiceovermaker.com/termsofuse Privacy Policy: https://voiceovermaker.com/privacypolicy Support: Please email for any suggestions/feedback voiceovermakerz@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Química Tabela Periódica 2026
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 5,99 € [1,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：5,99 €

Application Description

Explore a Tabela Periódica como nunca antes com o nosso inovador aplicativo 3D! Mergulhe no fascinante mundo dos elementos de uma forma totalmente nova e visualmente impressionante. Nosso aplicativo oferece uma experiência minimalista e envolvente que transforma a exploração da Tabela Periódica em uma jornada única e emocionante. Com nossa interface intuitiva e design minimalista, você pode navegar facilmente pelos elementos. Cada elemento ganha vida em um envolvente ambiente 3D, permitindo que você visualize sua estrutura de uma maneira que nunca experimentou antes. Observe como os elementos interagem entre si e descubra suas propriedades de uma maneira totalmente nova. Quer saber mais sobre um elemento específico? Nosso aplicativo fornece informações detalhadas e de fácil compreensão sobre cada elemento, desde suas propriedades físicas e químicas até sua história e usos práticos. A aprendizagem da Tabela Periódica nunca foi tão acessível e emocionante. Além disso, nosso aplicativo é perfeito para estudantes, profissionais e entusiastas da ciência. Seja você estudando química ou apenas curioso sobre o mundo dos elementos, nosso aplicativo 3D oferece uma experiência educacional e divertida. Baixe agora e mergulhe na beleza da Tabela Periódica de uma maneira que você nunca imaginou. Explore, aprenda e maravilhe-se com os elementos com nosso aplicativo 3D hoje!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: ScoreMaster - Board Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

Say goodbye to messy pen and paper! ScoreMaster is an all-in-one app designed specifically for board game and card game players. We handle the tedious calculations and physical accessories so you can focus 100% on the fun of the game. Perfectly Supports All Your Favorite Games: * Classic Board Games: Catan, Carcassonne, Rummikub * Card Games & Poker: Poker, Magic: The Gathering (MTG), Pokémon TCG, Yu-Gi-Oh! * Party & Social Deduction: Werewolf, Avalon, Codenames * RPGs: Dungeons & Dragons (D&D) and any custom scoring games Six Core Features: * Intuitive Scoring: Supports multiple players. Add or subtract points with a single tap on a clean, distraction-free interface. * Match History: Automatically saves final scores and historical match records for every game you play. * First Player Selector: Multiple players touch the screen to randomly pick the starting player in just one second. * Random Dice Roller: Built-in virtual dice. Roll instantly with a tap—never worry about forgetting physical dice again. * Countdown Timer: Customizable sand timer, essential for time-limited party games and trivia. * Versus Timer (Chess Clock): Dedicated 2-player turn timer. Say goodbye to slow play and keep competitive matches fair. Download ScoreMaster today and make your next game night smoother and more professional!

entry.title: Is This Seat Taken?
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：8,99 € → 5,99 € [5,99 € ~ 8,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：5,99 €

Application Description

Lugar à janela ou no corredor? Cabine ou mesa? Bicho do mato ou alma da festa? Em Is This Seat Taken?, a tua missão é organizar grupos de formas de acordo com as suas preferências. É um jogo de quebra-cabeças lógico, acolhedor e sem pressão, onde és responsável por decidir quem se senta onde. Seja no cinema, num autocarro lotado, numa festa de casamento ou num táxi apertado, cada ambiente apresenta novas personagens com gostos específicos. Um convidado de uma festa com um olfato sensível não ficará feliz sentado ao lado de um estranho que esteja a usar demasiado perfume. Um passageiro ensonado não ficará feliz a tentar dormir no autocarro ao lado de alguém que esteja a ouvir música alta. É tudo uma questão de ler a sala para encontrar o lugar perfeito! Nat quer representar e o seu mundo é virado de pernas para o ar quando vê uma forma igual a si no grande ecrã. Esta descoberta leva Nat a embarcar numa viagem pelo mundo para conhecer o seu ídolo e descobrir como se integrar. Vive a comovente história de Nat enquanto viajas de cidade em cidade, cada uma com os seus próprios níveis, personagens e charme. - Organiza lugares para agradar a personagens exigentes. - Descobre as características únicas de cada personagem: simples, excêntricas, tudo o que possas imaginar. - Resolve quebra-cabeças satisfatórios sem cronómetros ou tabelas de classificação. - Desbloqueia novos cenários divertidos à medida que avanças: desde viagens de autocarro a banquetes!

entry.title: Pasha Planet: Reborn
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：3,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 3,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

“Pasha Planet: Reborn” is the debut game of Scorpio Game, a Taiwanese independent game development studio. Prepare to be charmed by unique hand-painted scenes and have fun with light detective work, players will get to explore the main game plot that revolves around the characters’ daily life through an immersive and one-of-a-kind puzzle-solving gameplay. [Game Overview] The story takes place on the distant planet of Pasha. A prosperous underground city, which are inhabited by adorable doggies, can be found there. They live in peace day after day, enjoying the convenience brought about by technology. However, the protagonist Bobbie, who grew up in the city, often fantasizes about getting out of the closed-off Underground City to see the world outside. This is where the main story line of the game begins. Players will take on the role of Bobbie and explore the seemingly calm and peaceful city, which is in actual fact, facing an energy crisis. Players must clear stages of challenges to solve the final mystery and figure out a way to save all the inhabitants before disaster strikes! [Game Features] - Created by an independent game development studio in Taiwan. - Classic click-and-point puzzle-solving gameplay. - Charming and heartwarming hand-painted scenes. - Challenging puzzles and stages.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
